tree.statement: 这篇文章的标题是“不停歇的旅行者”。
tree.explanation: 标题位于文章开头，概括了主旨。

children.text: Hello to all my readers.
children.cn: 各位读者好。
children.notes: Greeting.
children.statement: 这是作者向读者打招呼。
children.explanation: Hello... 是标准的打招呼用语。

children.text: This week, I've decided to write about travel.
children.cn: 本周，我决定写写旅游。
children.notes: decide to do sth. 决定做某事；write about 描写，写关于...的内容。
children.statement: 作者本周的主题是关于旅行的。
children.explanation: 文中明确说 I've decided to write about travel。

children.text: Perhaps, like me, you've always thought that travelling is something for rich people.
children.cn: 也许，像我一样，你一直认为旅游是有钱人的事。
children.notes: rich people 富人；present perfect tense (have thought) 表示一直以来的想法。
children.statement: 作者现在仍然认为旅游必须是很有钱的人才能做的事。
children.explanation: 作者说“也许你像我（以前）一样这么想”，暗示现在想法变了。

children.text: Well, now I think I've been wrong all this time.
children.cn: 好吧，现在我认为我一直以来都错了。
children.notes: all this time 一直以来；wrong 错误的。
children.statement: 作者承认自己之前的观点是错误的。
children.explanation: I've been wrong all this time 表明作者改变了看法。

children.text: Why?
children.cn: 为什么呢？
children.notes: Rhetorical question.
children.statement: 这是一个设问句，引出下文原因。
children.explanation: 通过提问引导读者关注后续内容。

children.text: Well, I've discovered Nora Dunn.
children.cn: 嗯，我发现了一个叫 Nora Dunn 的人。
children.notes: discover 发现。
children.statement: Nora Dunn 是作者改变看法的关键原因。
children.explanation: 因为发现了 Nora，作者才意识到旅游不一定需要很多钱。

children.text: Nora is one of a new kind of traveller - a professional world traveller.
children.cn: Nora 是一种新型的旅行者——职业世界旅行者。
children.notes: kind of 种类；professional 职业的。
children.statement: Nora 是一名专业的旅行家。
children.explanation: professional world traveller 就是职业世界旅行者。

children.text: She travels all the time.
children.cn: 她一直在旅行。
children.notes: all the time 一直。
children.statement: Nora 只是偶尔休假时去旅行。
children.explanation: all the time 说明旅行就是她的生活常态。

children.text: Nora is from Toronto, Canada and until she was 30, she had a business there.
children.cn: Nora 来自加拿大多伦多，30岁之前，她在那里有一份事业。
children.notes: until 直到...为止；business 生意。
children.statement: Nora 在30岁之前过着稳定的定居生活。
children.explanation: 她在多伦多有自己的生意，直到30岁。

children.text: But then she made a big decision.
children.cn: 但随后她做了一个重大的决定。
children.notes: make a decision 做出决定。
children.statement: 这里 big decision 指的是放弃生意去环游世界。
children.explanation: 根据上下文，这个决定改变了她的生活轨迹。

children.text: Her dream was to travel the world and to do it before she got old!
children.cn: 她的梦想是环游世界，并在变老之前实现它！
children.notes: dream 梦想；before 在...之前。
children.statement: Nora 想等老了退休后再环游世界。
children.explanation: 她想在变老“之前” (before) 实现梦想。

children.text: So she sold her business and got rid of her belongings.
children.cn: 于是她卖掉了生意，处理掉了所有的财产。
children.notes: get rid of 摆脱，处理掉；belongings 财产。
children.statement: 为了旅行，Nora 处理掉了自己在多伦多的资产和物品。
children.explanation: sold business 和 got rid of belongings 都是具体的处理行为。

children.text: And off she went.
children.cn: 然后她就出发了。
children.notes: Off she went 倒装句，强调出发的动作。
children.statement: 这句话标志着 Nora 旅程的开始。
children.explanation: 这是一种生动的叙述方式。

children.text: Nora hasn't got rich parents or anyone who gives her money.
children.cn: Nora 没有有钱的父母，也没有人给她钱。
children.notes: hasn't got 没有；rich 有钱的。
children.statement: Nora 的旅行资金来源于家人的支持。
children.explanation: 文中明确说她没有有钱父母提供资金。

children.text: And she doesn't have a high-paying job.
children.cn: 她也没有高薪工作。
children.notes: high-paying 高薪的。
children.statement: Nora 即使不工作也能赚很多钱。
children.explanation: 文中说她没有高薪工作。

children.text: But she's learned how to travel without spending lots of money.
children.cn: 但她学会了如何在不花很多钱的情况下旅行。
children.notes: learn how to do sth. 学会如何做某事；without 没有。
children.statement: Nora 证明了没钱也可以通过某种方式旅行。
children.explanation: 她学会了节省开支的旅行技巧。

children.text: Nora goes to a place and stays there for some time.
children.cn: Nora 去一个地方，然后在那里待上一段时间。
children.notes: stay 停留；for some time 一段时间。
children.statement: Nora 的旅行方式是走马观花式的，从不停留。
children.explanation: stays there for some time 说明她会深入体验一个地方。

children.text: She works to earn enough money to have a good time and to save a bit, then she moves on to another place.
children.cn: 她边工作边赚钱，为了玩得开心并存点钱，然后她再前往另一个地方。
children.notes: earn money 赚钱；move on 继续前进。
children.statement: Nora 通过在当地工作来支付她的旅行费用。
children.explanation: 这是她维持长期旅行的核心方法。

children.text: She prefers simple forms of transport like trains or buses, but of course there are times when planes are a necessity.
children.cn: 她更喜欢简单的交通工具，比如火车或公共汽车，但当然也有必须坐飞机的时候。
children.notes: prefer 更喜欢；necessity 必需品。
children.statement: Nora 从来不坐飞机。
children.explanation: 有时飞机也是必须的 (necessity)。

children.text: And she writes from wherever she is, which earns her some money too.
children.cn: 无论她在哪里，她都会写稿，这也能让她赚一些钱。
children.notes: wherever 无论哪里；earn 赚取。
children.statement: 写作是 Nora 赚取旅费的途径之一。
children.explanation: which earns her some money 指代写作这件事。

children.text: She's done a lot of different jobs, including working in hotels and in restaurants.
children.cn: 她做过很多不同的工作，包括在酒店和餐厅工作。
children.notes: including 包括；hotel 酒店；restaurant 餐厅。
children.statement: Nora 为了生存可以胜任多种不同的基础工作。
children.explanation: 文中列举了酒店和餐厅作为例子。

children.text: And she's learned things like cooking and meditation.
children.cn: 她还学会了烹饪和冥想等技能。
children.notes: cooking 烹饪；meditation 冥想。
children.statement: 旅行不仅是看风景，还让 Nora 掌握了新技能。
children.explanation: 她学到了烹饪和冥想。

children.text: So where has Nora been?
children.cn: 那么 Nora 都去过哪里呢？
children.notes: Present perfect tense to ask about experiences.
children.statement: 接下来的内容将介绍 Nora 的旅行足迹。
children.explanation: 这是一个过渡性的提问。

children.text: Well, everywhere!
children.cn: 嗯，到处都去过！
children.notes: everywhere 表示范围极广。
children.statement: Nora 的足迹几乎遍布全球。
children.explanation: everywhere 强调了她旅行范围之大。

children.text: She's been to all five continents and she's travelled to over thirty countries.
children.cn: 她去过所有五个大洲，游历了三十多个国家。
children.notes: continent 洲；over 超过。
children.statement: Nora 去过的国家数量还没有到30个。
children.explanation: over thirty countries 表示“超过30个”。

children.text: All in six years!
children.cn: 都在六年之内！
children.notes: Emphasis on time.
children.statement: Nora 在六年的时间里完成了这么多旅行。
children.explanation: 文中明确说是 six years。

children.text: She's taken a train across Canada and she's travelled by train from Portugal to Vietnam - an incredible journey.
children.cn: 她坐火车横穿了加拿大，还坐火车从葡萄牙到了越南——一段不可思议的旅程。
children.notes: across 横穿；incredible 不可思议的。
children.statement: Nora 曾经尝试过超长距离的火车旅行。
children.explanation: 从葡萄牙到越南是一段横跨欧亚大陆的长途旅行。

children.text: She's lived on a boat in the Caribbean and she's worked for her accommodation in Hawaii, Australia, New Zealand, Spain, England, Grenada and Switzerland, and a number of other places too.
children.cn: 她在加勒比海的一艘船上生活过，还在夏威夷、澳大利亚、新西兰、西班牙、英国、格林纳达和瑞士等许多地方工作以换取住宿。
children.notes: accommodation 住宿；Caribbean 加勒比海。
children.statement: Nora 在瑞士也是通过工作来换取住宿的。
children.explanation: Switzerland 在 worked for her accommodation 的列表里。

children.text: And she's been on television shows in three countries.
children.cn: 她还在三个国家的电视节目中亮相。
children.notes: television show 电视节目。
children.statement: Nora 在一些国家已经成为了一个公众人物。
children.explanation: 上电视节目说明她受到了一定的关注。

children.text: She's had a lot of fantastic adventures, and she hasn't stopped finding new things!
children.cn: 她有很多奇妙的冒险，而且她从未停止寻找新事物！
children.notes: fantastic 极好的；adventure 冒险。
children.statement: Nora 现在已经停止寻找新的东西了。
children.explanation: she hasn't stopped 说明探索还在继续。

children.text: Some of her experiences have not been easy ones.
children.cn: 她的一些经历并不轻松。
children.notes: not easy ones 困难的经历。
children.statement: Nora 的旅行生活中也包含挑战和灾难。
children.explanation: 下文举例说明了她遇到的困难情况。

children.text: In 2008 she helped people in Thailand and Burma after a cyclone hit their countries.
children.cn: 2008年，在气旋袭击泰国和缅甸后，她帮助了那里的人们。
children.notes: cyclone 气旋；hit 袭击。
children.statement: Nora 曾在灾难发生后提供过志愿帮助。
children.explanation: she helped people 说明她参与了帮助。

children.text: And in 2009 she helped to fight forest fires in Australia.
children.cn: 2009年，她在澳大利亚协助扑灭森林火灾。
children.notes: forest fire 森林大火；fight 扑灭。
children.statement: Nora 在澳大利亚帮助当地人对抗火灾。
children.explanation: 文中提到 she helped to fight forest fires in Australia。

children.text: So, she's seen a lot so far.
children.cn: 所以，到目前为止她已经见识了很多。
children.notes: so far 到目前为止。
children.statement: 作者对 Nora 的经历进行了总结。
children.explanation: 这是一句总结性的话。

children.text: She's learned that full-time travel doesn't have to be expensive, and she knows now that there are plenty of ways to do it - so many ways, in fact, that she's started a website to tell other people about them.
children.cn: 她了解到全职旅行不一定很昂贵，而且她现在知道有很多方法可以实现它——事实上，方法如此之多，以至于她创办了一个网站来告诉其他人。
children.notes: full-time 全职的；plenty of 许多；so...that... 如此...以至于...。
children.statement: Nora 认为只有有钱人才能全职旅行。
children.explanation: 她学到了全职旅行“不一定” (doesn't have to be) 很贵。

children.text: It's theprofessionalhobo.com.
children.cn: 网站是 theprofessionalhobo.com。
children.notes: URL of the website.
children.statement: Nora 的网站旨在分享如何职业化旅行。
children.explanation: hobo 在这里指代四处漂泊旅行的人。

children.text: I've seen lots of travel sites, and this is one of the best.
children.cn: 我看过很多旅游网站，这是最好的网站之一。
children.notes: one of the best 最好的...之一。
children.statement: 作者非常推荐这个网站。
children.explanation: this is one of the best 表达了极高的认可。

children.text: Have a look.
children.cn: 去看看吧。
children.notes: Imperative sentence for suggestion.
children.statement: 作者建议读者亲自去看看网站。
children.explanation: have a look 是鼓励动作。

children.text: Perhaps you'll be the next 'world traveller'?
children.cn: 也许你就是下一个“世界旅行者”？
children.notes: Encouraging closing remark.
children.statement: 作者鼓励读者也去尝试这种生活方式。
children.explanation: 这是对读者的一种启发和激励。
